body:
A Minecraft Mod for Vanilla Expandataiton.

It has added fireflies, trout, and piranha.

It modified the food attributes of raw beef, raw pork, raw lamb, raw rabbit, raw salmon, tropical fish, egg, and turtle egg.

It adds edible attributes to some of the original food, such as:
seaweed
Torch flower seeds
mushroom
fungi
Sugarcane
Rabbit's Foot
Fermented Spider Eyes
Exploding Purple Song Fruit
Glistering Melon.

It added baobab tree, paulownia tree, and rhododendron tree
